examples: If your braided hair has loosened, if the parting of your hair be not straight, or if the ribbons of your bodice be not fastened, do not mind.

RememBEr that if the waist of the bodice is altered the skirt must BE altered also to match.
Wang also reworked the classic white shirt with an overlay of fringe on the bodice.
From knuckle to wrist to elbow, waist to bodice to neck, she was ablaze in jewels.
